title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma and other models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate embeddings, pull/list models, streaming support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing LLM, chat and embeddings interfaces backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and generating embeddings with Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-cord
summary: Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to servers using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for private LLM tests.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, PDF Q&A, voice chat, fine-tuning, edge deployment.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama binaries and development shells for x86_64 & ARM.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate with serde types for the full Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization, and semantic search over vault notes.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with locally hosted models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI that streams Ollama responses and lets users switch models on the fly.
